## Compatibility and risk

- [ ] No public API, SQLite schema, portable-bundle, or authorization change
- [ ] Compatibility and migration impact is documented when applicable
- [ ] Core memory invariants remain covered by tests
- [ ] User-facing documentation and examples are synchronized
- [ ] No credentials, local databases, run artifacts, or user data are included
